title: Registry Table Stress
subtitle: Stress contract with many columns, long text, and semantic badges

rows.definition: Aligned view of systems, interfaces, boundaries, and reusable knowledge modules.
rows.risk: Scope must match declared domain boundary.

rows.definition: Authoritative document or system record used to validate derived knowledge.
Condition that limits how an asset, parameter, or process module can be reused.
Approved knowledge package that can be referenced by maps, taxonomies, or workflows.
rows.risk: Must cite source boundary and owner.

rows.definition: Boundary where one system or team exchanges data, decisions, or responsibilities.
Named category in a hierarchy used to classify knowledge objects.
rows.risk: Do not skip parent levels without rule.

rows.definition: Measure used to evaluate quality, completeness, or readiness of an asset.

annotations.text: Stress template: long rows should wrap inside cells while badges remain semantic.
